_comment: FIND-3-TS-3: Single source of truth for attachment-sibling placeholder prefixes. Consumed by gateway/src/session/mod.rs (Rust include_str! + OnceLock), gateway/src/capture/attachments.rs, and api/src/placeholder-mask.ts. Adding a prefix here updates both Rust and TypeScript consumers without a drift test. Removing a prefix must be done in a coordinated release so no raw placeholders leak through.
_usage: prefixes MUST start with '[' and end with ':'. Matching semantics: text must start_with(prefix), contain('source:'), end_with(']'), and not contain('\n').
